LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT AIDA O'NEAL'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DENIED. DEFENDANT HAS FAILED TO SET FORTH FACTS THAT ESTABLISH A NOVATION AS CONTRASTED WITH A MODIFICATION AND ALSO HAS FAILED TO DEMONSTRATE IMPOSSIBILITY. DEFENDANT ONLY RAISED THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS IN REPLY, WHICH IS CONTRARY TO C.C.P. SECTION 437C. BY ALLOWING PLAINTIFF TO FILE AN AMENDED COMPLAINT, DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR LACK OF STANDING IS MOOT AND THIS PART OF THE RULING IS WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO DEFENDANT SUBSEQUENTLY CHALLENGING STANDING. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600
